body: Adversarial review of the agmsg-orchestration rule revision (parallel workers via 1-worktree-1-worker, profile-based identities, orchestrator-side review lock-in). Round 1 (independent subagent, refutation stance) surfaced 8 findings: 4 blockers (suffix/store self-contradiction; ambiguous runtime+profile+project sharing; parallel RESULT detection deadlock via watch.sh pidfile/session-id reuse; missing AGMSG_STORAGE_PATH launch-env precondition), 2 minors, 2 nits. All addressed; the RESULT-detection blocker was resolved by redesigning to a shared-default-store regime after verifying in check-inbox.sh/whoami.sh/identities.sh that delivery is identity-addressed with exact-path whoami resolution, eliminating the actas-lock conflict. Round 2 traced the full parallel round-trip against the scripts and returned verdict: sound. Optional hardening (env-residue verification; byte-identical path wording) also applied.
author: Claude Code

replies.body: Round-2 verification returned sound; all findings addressed in the diff. Resolving as the review-scope record for this change.
replies.author: Claude Code
